omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Feedback information. When you contact us for feedback or customer service, we will collect the information and material that you submitted, your contact information (such as your phone number, email address), so that we could contact you and answer your questions or provide other customer services to you.

When you apply to become a creator, you can fill in your nickname, gender, country and other information in the "Basic Information", and you can fill in your social platform, personal homepage link and other information to prove your creative ability. In order to ensure the security of your account and related transactions, we will require your real name, identity ID, identity certificate and other information for real-name authentication. Without real-name authentication, you may not be able to obtain relevant services that require real-name authentication, but your use of other functions will not be affected.

Device and log information. When you use our Services through the Platforms, in order to make sure you use our Services normally and the functions operating smoothly and safely, improve and optimize your use experience, Carryout advertisement putting and message push, and protect your account security, we will collect your device and log information as follows:Include unique device identifier, gaid,device model, system language, country, advertising identifier, operating system, system version number, IP address, software version number, access network, network quality data, and service log information.
